findings.evidence: `rg "theorem existsUnique_continuousMap_lifts" mathlib/Mathlib/Topology/Homotopy/Lifting.lean` shows Mathlib line 469: `theorem existsUnique_continuousMap_lifts [SimplyConnectedSpace A] [LocallyPathConnectedSpace A] (f : C(A, X)) (a₀ : A) (e₀ : E) (he : p e₀ = f a₀) : ∃! F : C(A, E), F a₀ = e₀ ∧ p ∘ F = f`, which directly proves the conclusion of the new theorem at lines 84-90.
findings.fix: Remove this declaration or replace uses with `hp.existsUnique_continuousMap_lifts f a₀ e₀ he`; if a roadmap-facing alias is still needed, do not include the redundant subgroup hypotheses.
findings.issue: `existsUnique_continuousMap_lifts_of_simplyConnectedSpace_subgroup` duplicates Mathlib's simply-connected lifting theorem while adding unused `H` and `hHp` assumptions.

summary: One new declaration is directly subsumed by an existing Mathlib lifting theorem with weaker hypotheses; the other subgroup-factorized wrappers are not direct duplicates under this rubric.
